originalTitle: Live Dev - PufferLib is Fixing Reinforcement Learning
title: Implementing MuZero-Style Search with World Model for Model-Based RL in PufferLib
summary: Implemented and debugged a MuZero-inspired search-based model-based RL algorithm in PufferLib, focusing on world model forward passes, action conditioning, and reward prediction. Achieved on-par performance with the on-policy baseline but not yet surpassing it.
